resource.manifest:
apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: ApprovalGate
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: ApprovalGate
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: KafkaCluster
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: TrafficReplay
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: KafkaCluster
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshot: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshot}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshot: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshot}}"
  checksumForReplayer: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForReplayer}}"
  serviceEndpoint: "{{inputs.parameters.serviceEndpoint}}"
  loadBalancerEndpoint: "{{inputs.parameters.loadBalancerEndpoint}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  snapshotName: "{{inputs.parameters.snapshotName}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshotMigration: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshotMigration}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForReplayer: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForReplayer}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  outputs:
    metadataEvaluate:
      artifactName: "{{inputs.parameters.artifactName}}"
      s3Key: "{{inputs.parameters.s3Key}}"
      resourceUid: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceUid}}"
      workflowName: "{{workflow.name}}"
      migrationRunNumber: "{{workflow.parameters.migrationRunNumber}}"
      workflowCreationTimestamp: "{{workflow.creationTimestamp}}"
      configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  outputs:
    metadataMigrate:
      artifactName: "{{inputs.parameters.artifactName}}"
      s3Key: "{{inputs.parameters.s3Key}}"
      resourceUid: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceUid}}"
      workflowName: "{{workflow.name}}"
      migrationRunNumber: "{{workflow.parameters.migrationRunNumber}}"
      workflowCreationTimestamp: "{{workflow.creationTimestamp}}"
      configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: TrafficReplay
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: kafka.strimzi.io/v1
kind: KafkaTopic
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.topicName)}}

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.secretName)}}

apiVersion: kafka.strimzi.io/v1
kind: Kafka
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.resourceName)}}
